message:
fix: GitHubCIMonitor/RBACExplorer consecutiveFailures, ServiceStatus stats, GPUInventory test (#5784)

- Wire consecutiveFailures from useCache to useCardLoadingState in GitHubCIMonitor (#5778)
- Add isRefreshing and consecutiveFailures to useRBACFindings hook and RBACExplorer (#5777)
- Fix ServiceStatus type breakdown stats to use allFilteredItems matching totalItems (#5775)
- Fix GPUInventory test: mock useCardLoadingState with showSkeleton for loading test (#5776)
- Add allFilteredItems to useCardData return type for pre-pagination filtered access
- Update useCardData mocks in 10 test files to include allFilteredItems

Fixes #5775 #5776 #5777 #5778

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -329,6 +329,8 @@ export function useCardSort<T, S extends string>(
 export interface UseCardDataResult<T, S extends string> {
   /** Final processed items (filtered, sorted, paginated) */
   items: T[]
+  /** All items after filtering and sorting, before pagination */
+  allFilteredItems: T[]
   /** Total items before pagination */
   totalItems: number
   /** Current page */
@@ -413,6 +415,8 @@ export function useCardData<T, S extends string = string>(
 
   return {
     items: paginatedItems,
+    /** All items after filtering and sorting, before pagination */
+    allFilteredItems: sorted,
     totalItems: sorted.length,
     currentPage,
     totalPages,
